description: V3-07(S8) allow-list consumed by scripts/v3/hardcoded-text-scan.mjs. Entries here are EXCLUDED from the GAP count + CI-strict-mode regression check. Keep additions justified — a comment alongside each entry shows why it's safe (brand idioms, dev-only labels, vendor-mandated text, etc.). Owner-reserved paths are hard-coded in the scanner, not in this file.

notes.strings: Day + month tokens that resolve via Intl on the surface but appear as fallback literals in non-localised utility files.
notes.filePrefixes: super-app + company-hub are Expo (React Native) apps with their own i18n stack and should not be lumped into the Next.js JSX scan. scripts/ and tools/ are not walked at all — see SCAN_ROOTS in hardcoded-text-scan.mjs.
